sourceTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do not enter confidential, personal, proprietary or otherwise sensitive information Do not rely on the accuracy of outputs Openly acknowledge your use of AI (e.g. educators must model best practice by being transparent and clear with students about how these tools are used)
evidenceLocator: The policy and assessment frameworks section, 'The University of Sydney's guardrails around generative AI'
